archetype: Pastel & Soft (Archetype 3) mixed with Clean App Utility

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8 for cards. gap-6 and gap-8 for grids.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Bento grid for analytics/history view. Centered focused layout for main tracking screen.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Soft Glassmorphism for header nav, Neumorphism/Crisp Cards for analytics widgets. 1px borders with slight drop shadow on light mode, subtle inner stroke on dark mode.

motion.hover_states: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg on interactive elements.
motion.progress_ring: Smooth stroke-dashoffset transition for the water filling animation.
motion.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide-up on enter.

components_strategy.buttons: Rounded-full for main actions (friendly, approachable). Hover state lighter hue.
components_strategy.cards: rounded-3xl (high corner radius) for a playful and modern app feel. No harsh edges.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts (Shadcn Chart component) with rounded bar corners (radius={8}).
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn UI customized with rounded-2xl, soft background.
components_strategy.progress: Custom SVG Circular Progress Ring, heavily styled with glowing drop shadow when full.

images.description: Close up photo of blue water ripples. Use as full screen background for login/signup page in light mode with a heavy blur or 50% white overlay.
Dark water ripples. Use as full screen background for login/signup page in dark mode with heavy blur or 50% black overlay.

icons.usage: Use Droplet for tracking, Bell for reminders, History for analytics, Settings for config.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive buttons (e.g. data-testid="add-water-btn", data-testid="theme-toggle")

key_features_guidance.progress_tracker: The main focal point should be a large circular progress ring right in the middle of the screen. Inside the ring, show current amount / goal (e.g., 1200 / 2000 ml).
key_features_guidance.quick_add_buttons: Place below the progress ring. Buttons for 100ml, 250ml (glass), 500ml (bottle).
key_features_guidance.history_analytics: Use a simple BarChart to show the last 7 days of water intake. Overlay a dotted line for the daily goal.
key_features_guidance.reminders: In the settings, provide Select dropdowns or Switch toggles for 'Vibrate', 'Sound', and a mock select for 'Custom Sound'.
